title: draba subularia
intro: Draba subularia, also known as small cress or draba, is a small, annual or biennial plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Draba subularia include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Draba subularia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
